name: article-catalog-with-pricing
description: Article (product) CRUD with bulk pricing — supports 'X for Y' bundle deals via bundleQuantity/bundlePrice columns and a calculator that returns the effective per-unit price for any quantity.

endpoints: GET /api/articles/lookup?article_number=... — single article (for autocomplete in line-item forms)

postInstall: 1. Add `articles` to the schema map exported by lib/db/schema
2. Push the schema: drizzle-kit push (or run db/migrations/articles.sql manually)
3. Use lookup endpoint from any line-item form (see transaction-crud-template)
4. The bundle-pricing model assumes one tier; for multi-tier deals replace pricing.ts
